title: Semantic Gaussian Memory
subtitle: Queryable 3D Semantic Gaussian Maps for Embodied Navigation

teaser.title: office2 continuous 3D semantic class projection
teaser.caption: A continuous 90-frame Replica office2 sequence. The left panel is RGB input and the right panel is a 3D semantic class projection from PanoGS pre_semantic.npy, with fixed Replica class colors.

abstract: Work2 studies how temporally ordered RGB-D observations become a persistent 3D semantic memory for embodied navigation. The current evidence is PanoGS office2 reconstruction with 21-class semantic labels projected back to moving views and exposed as an interactive 3D map. Public comparison remains gated until all Replica scenes finish.

architecture.text: Actual office2 tensors and modules. Counts and sizes are read from local status files and synced artifacts.

video_note: 3D evidence is the interactive semantic point cloud above. Static top-down panels are kept out of the main story.

public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: full eight-scene public LangSplatV2 adapter rows exist under the Work2 ReplicaOcc protocol, but this is not official LangSplatV2 benchmark parity because OpenAI ViT-B/16 fallback features and a 100-iteration adapter were used
public_methods.next_action: use as adapted Work2 ReplicaOcc metric row only
public_methods.paper_protocol_metrics: query localization or segmentation metrics; Work2 adapted top8 mIoU only

public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: full eight-scene public GAGS adapter rows exist under the Work2 ReplicaOcc protocol, but this is not official GAGS benchmark parity and uses the documented OpenAI ViT-B/16 fallback
public_methods.next_action: use as adapted Work2 ReplicaOcc metric row only
public_methods.paper_protocol_metrics: visual grounding and semantic segmentation on annotated language labels
public_methods.paper_reported_result: Reports average gains of 10.9 percent in visual grounding and 7.0 percent in semantic segmentation. LERF overall mIoU is 52.21 and Mip-NeRF360 overall mIoU is 65.09. Ramen inference time is 24 seconds versus 49 seconds for LangSplat.

public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: SAGA source is staged, but the audited route provides promptable masks, not fixed ReplicaOcc class predictions, and required assets are not staged
public_methods.next_action: move SAGA to blocked context unless batch prompts, required assets, class mapping, and voxel export are supplied

public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: SOVGaussian has an official paper page, but Work2 has no runnable source snapshot, prediction artifact, fixed ReplicaOcc class export, or normalized metric rows
public_methods.next_action: keep SOVGaussian as related-method context until runnable source and no-GT prediction export are available

public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: full eight-scene ILGS adapter rows exist under the Work2 ReplicaOcc 24-frame protocol, but this is not official ILGS benchmark parity and does not support public SOTA wording
public_methods.next_action: use as adapted Work2 ReplicaOcc metric row only
public_methods.paper_protocol_metrics: language-mask evaluation; Work2 adapted top8 mIoU only

public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: Online LangSplat public source is staged, but Work2 lacks vMAP Replica inputs, required public weights, frozen no-GT prediction export, retained class mapping, and normalized ReplicaOcc metric rows
public_methods.next_action: keep Online LangSplat blocked for metric use until vMAP Replica inputs, public weights, frozen no-GT prediction export, retained class mapping, and full8 evaluator rows are available

public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: ReLaGS public remote source is visible, but Work2 lacks a runnable local snapshot, upstream evaluation scripts, relation-to-class mapping, no-GT prediction export, and normalized ReplicaOcc metric rows
public_methods.next_action: keep ReLaGS blocked for metric use until a runnable local source snapshot, upstream evaluation scripts, relation-to-class mapping, no-GT prediction export, and full8 evaluator rows are available
public_methods.paper_reported_result: Reports LeRF-OVS mean mIoU 64.4, ScanNet 10-class mIoU 47.17, relationship-guided ScanNet++ mIoU 0.56, and 12.6 minute overall scene graph construction against RelationField's 60 minute inseparable process.

public_methods.current_gate: office0 pointwise mIoU 0.4537 mAcc 0.5677; room0 pointwise mIoU 0.7349 mAcc 0.8215; room1 pointwise mIoU 0.7187 mAcc 0.8454; room2 pointwise mIoU 0.6928 mAcc 0.8628; office1 pointwise mIoU 0.2235 mAcc 0.3114; office1 SAM, reconstruction, feature fusion, decoder training, and segmentation are complete; full8 aggregate not completed; office2 SAM 2000/2000 finished; office2 reconstruction status FINISHED_PANOGS_OFFICE2_RECON; point_cloud_exists=True; office2 feature fusion status FINISHED_PANOGS_OFFICE2_FEATURE_FUSION; features_exists=True; weights_exists=True; office2 run_feat status FINISHED_PANOGS_OFFICE2_RUN_FEAT; decoder_ckpt_exists=True; office2 run_segment status FINISHED_PANOGS_OFFICE2_RUN_SEGMENT; final_seg_exists=True; pre_semantic_exists=True; eval_pointwise_semantic_exists=True
public_methods.blocker_or_boundary: PanoGS office0, room0, room1, room2, and office1 segmentation outputs exist, and all five scenes have pointwise semantic eval text. These are scene-level PanoGS diagnostics only. Full eight-scene aggregate evaluation and normalized Work2 main-table rows do not exist yet, so PanoGS is still excluded from ranked public-baseline comparison. Office2 reconstruction has produced point_cloud.ply. Downstream feature fusion, decoder, and segmentation states are tracked in later gates. Office2 feature fusion finished and features.npy / weights.npy exist. Downstream decoder and segmentation states are tracked in later gates. Office2 decoder checkpoint exists. Downstream segmentation state is tracked in the run_segment gate. Office2 segmentation finished and pointwise eval exists. Single-scene mIoU=0.5658 and mAcc=0.6572. This is not a full8 public SOTA row.
public_methods.next_action: Repeat the PanoGS chain for office3 and office4, then aggregate full eight-scene rows.

public_methods.paper_reported_result: Reports about 3 minutes for grouping and scene map construction. ScanNet 19-class semantic segmentation reaches 31.6 mIoU under 50-NN majority. Ref-LeRF ablation improves from 24.3 to 42.4 mIoU with full components.

evidence.boundary: Visual teaser only. It is not a public SOTA metric row.
Selected office panels. No all-scene qualitative dominance claim.
Qualitative and source-metric evidence. Not a public leaderboard claim.
Progress tracking table. It is not a public SOTA table.
Pointwise results for five scenes. Full8 aggregate is incomplete.
Running mask generation only. No reconstruction or metric result yet.

evidence.artifact: Server-synced office2 RGB and SAM frames
evidence.boundary: Input and SAM preprocessing evidence only. No reconstruction, segmentation metric, full8 aggregate or public SOTA claim.
Office2 point_cloud.ply exists and is used as reconstruction evidence. Downstream feature fusion, decoder and segmentation states are recorded in later rows. No full8 aggregate is claimed yet.
Feature fusion output exists. Decoder and segmentation states are recorded in later rows. No full8 aggregate or public SOTA claim is available yet.
Decoder checkpoint exists. Segmentation and pointwise eval are recorded in later rows. No full8 aggregate or public SOTA claim is available yet.
Office2 single-scene pointwise eval and an interactive semantic point-cloud sample exist. No full8 aggregate or public SOTA claim is available yet.

evidence.artifact: Office2 continuous temporal RGB/SAM overlay video
evidence.boundary: Consecutive server frames 1250-1339 with same-index SAM raw masks rendered by a fixed cyan and yellow palette. Temporal input and preprocessing evidence only; not SAM2 tracking, a new metric, or public SOTA result.

evidence.artifact: Office2 continuous RGB and 3D semantic projection video
evidence.boundary: Consecutive server RGB frames 1250-1339 with projected PanoGS 3D class labels. This is semantic projection evidence, not SAM2 tracking, manual labeling, a new metric, or a full public SOTA result.

boundaries: This is a local project page and progress evidence page, not a public SOTA claim.
Single-frame 2D image segmentation is not the main task. It is retained only as preprocessing or diagnostic evidence.
RGB and SAM frames are upstream dynamic observations. They are not presented as the final research output.
The 3D semantic map is shown as an interactive point-cloud sample, not as a rotation video result.
Relation queries, temporal object tracking and predictive world modeling are target directions. They are not claimed before completed local outputs exist.
The public method table tracks seventeen methods, but only three currently have adapted full eight-scene metric rows.
External project pages and demo media are references only. No third-party demo video or image is copied as work2 evidence.
next_actions: Repeat the PanoGS chain for office3 and office4.
Aggregate full eight-scene PanoGS rows after the remaining scenes finish.
Add a SAM2-style video tracking branch with frame-wise ID continuity, drop-frame count and temporal IoU.
Map tracked 2D masks into 3D Gaussians for continuous temporal semantic segmentation.
Add relation-query visual evidence after local segmentation outputs exist.
Start a predictive world-model branch only after semantic state is stable enough to forecast held-out future frames.
Regenerate progress_site/data/site.json after each new server sync.

implementation_choice_note.summary: Current page uses a 90-frame continuous office2 RGB and 3D semantic projection video, a wide interactive 3D semantic point-cloud viewer with Replica 21-class labels, and compact benchmark tables. Static top-down panels and long protocol cards are excluded from the main story.

excluded_media_policy: Excluded .venv, site-packages, third_party, cache, archive and external demo media from evidence selection.

abstract_points.label: Problem
abstract_points.text: Single-frame masks do not preserve 3D object state or temporal memory.

abstract_points.label: Method
abstract_points.text: RGB-D, SAM masks, Gaussian reconstruction and decoder output are fused into 21-class 3D semantic labels.

abstract_points.label: Status
abstract_points.text: office2 segmentation finished with single-scene mIoU 0.5658 and mAcc 0.6572. Full8 comparison is still open.

public_methods_meta.title: Public Baseline Evidence Table
public_methods_meta.boundary: The browser reloads site.json every 30 seconds. Server progress appears here after sync-only updates local logs and this script regenerates site.json.
